_comment: Isolates NC-OC-003. gateway.nodes.deny_commands_ineffective is the only security finding. All other controls pass. Captured live 2026-03-18. Also discovered gateway.token_too_short checkId (new — not in control library).

new_checkIds_discovered.note: Fires when gateway auth token is below minimum length. Discovered when using a short test token. Not in v0.1 control library — add as NC-OC-014 or similar.

key_validation: Isolates NC-OC-003 (deny_commands_ineffective) — proves control correctly FAILs when ineffective deny command names are configured.
